textByHash.50c8e45dba9c61975181df91bcc515f7bf2e2984: You! Which god do you serve?
textByHash.b66fadd579fdcefe67d0647a34db531288f55d0c: The war! What side do you fight on?
textByHash.9bff1086187a103d4084962e4fa15bdce47f4d2b: No war? But I was fighting earlier today.
textByHash.3fec0cecc2d9c39122661de135f05a12a798931d: Dead? That can't be! I am a loyal warrior of...
textByHash.c002f16547387b1011e10226320ed155ff8184f6: I... I don't know. I can't remember.
textByHash.f6e2cc67ddbb2512d6c875313da17a066a466a0f: We came here to fight. But I don't know who for. It's like it was moments ago, but also a lifetime in the past.
textByHash.6ce37550aeb6ef39cda7aacf3a4ba9b87c4b992c: No. We were here to claim something. To protect it. But everything else is unclear.
textByHash.0a552ae251d3d54dfc53febf467cb14195816e26: I'm sorry, this is all so confusing. I need some time to try and understand.
textByHash.aa28267ad8aa5b41a7ce4e40984be8525819a277: You wear cunning disguise. I see though. You flappy chicken! You die in name of Big High War God.
textByHash.b73b0f5c29ac8d359fa81668200ecc9d8781aa93: Lies! Big High War God use the shiny to kill the chickens! Now we clear up the rest!
textByHash.8ecbebfc10397e2610687daa083e4490bb181b85: Chicken play mind games, but I no fool. You die now!
